## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor or maintenance

## Verification

- [ ] I tested the change locally
- [ ] Existing tests pass
- [ ] Documentation was updated where needed

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and ready to review
- [ ] No private information or generated state is included
